title: Fire Engine Rescue Truck with Firefighter Utility Bucket
description:
Your little one can pretend play to rescue civilians from fires and save the day with the help of the Firefighter Engine Truck! Attached is an extended ladder with a bucket, the perfect size for rescuing miniature action figures. The Firefighter Rescue Engine Truck is a classic children's toy. Lights up and makes sounds like a real fire truck! The friction power of the vehicle allows for easy gliding along the floor. The 360 Degree rotating extending crane has an attached bucket that has room for a small action figure to fit. This is the perfect gift for the little hero in your life!
Deals Only Web Store
Our Store

Fire Engine Rescue Truck with Firefighter Utility Bucket

Gear up for rescue missions and heroic adventures!

Key Features

  • PUSH & GO ACTION - Friction-powered wheels make for smooth, no-battery movement across floors and play surfaces.
  • 360 DEGREE ROTATING CRANE - Extending crane spins a full circle for realistic and dynamic rescue play.
  • UTILITY BUCKET FOR ACTION FIGURES - Safely lifts and rescues small figures, enhancing role-play possibilities.
  • STURDY & COLORFUL BUILD - Durable plastic construction in bold fire engine red catches the eye and stands up to play.
  • PERFECT SIZE FOR KIDS - Measuring 14" x 3.25" x 4", it’s easy to handle, store, and gift to aspiring young firefighters.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: FERTFUB
  • UPC: 885189309447
  • Color: Red
  • Size: Large

Bring big city firefighting fun into your home with the Fire Engine Rescue Truck. Featuring a fully rotating, extendable crane and a working utility bucket perfectly sized for small action figures, this vibrant red rescue truck lets kids imagine daring saves and emergency rescues. Just push and go - the friction-powered wheels keep the action rolling as your little hero rushes to the scene!

Whether it's for a birthday, holiday, or just because, this rescue truck is the perfect gift to spark imaginative play in kids who dream big and play bigger.
